case_title: XUE QIN WANG VS. LILAN CHAU

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, XUE QIN AS TO DEFENDANT CHAU, LILAN AN IND. DBA E.J. PRINTING COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAU, LILAN AN IND. DBA E.J. PRINTING COMPANY $3,478.66 PRINCIPAL, $45.09 INTEREST, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,624.75, TOTAL $3,624.75
